'''dhajala''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:taberd|taberd]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| dh-j-l
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:taberd|taberd]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| dhajala
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:dhæjælæth|dhæjælæth]] || [[word:dhæjælæj|dhæjælæj]] || [[word:dhæjælæsh|dhæjælæsh]] || [[word:dhæjælæ|dhæjælæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:dhajajalath|dhajajalath]] || [[word:dhajajalaj|dhajajalaj]] || [[word:dhajajalash|dhajajalash]] || [[word:dhajajala|dhajajala]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:dhajalath|dhajalath]] || [[word:dhajalaj|dhajalaj]] || [[word:dhajalash|dhajalash]] || [[word:dhajala|dhajala]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:dhajaflath|dhajaflath]] || [[word:dhajaflaj|dhajaflaj]] || [[word:dhajaflash|dhajaflash]] || [[word:dhajaflaf|dhajaflaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:dhajalatha|dhajalatha]] || [[word:dhajalaja|dhajalaja]] || [[word:dhajalasha|dhajalasha]] || [[word:dhajalaka|dhajalaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:dhajalath|dhajalath]] || [[word:dhajalaj|dhajalaj]] || [[word:dhajalash|dhajalash]] || [[word:dhajala|dhajala]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:dhajalathal|dhajalathal]] || [[word:dhajalajal|dhajalajal]] || [[word:dhajalashal|dhajalashal]] || [[word:dhajalakal|dhajalakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:dhajalathatha|dhajalathatha]] || [[word:dhajalajaja|dhajalajaja]] || [[word:dhajalashasha|dhajalashasha]] || [[word:dhajalaka|dhajalaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:dhajalathan|dhajalathan]] || [[word:dhajalajan|dhajalajan]] || [[word:dhajalashan|dhajalashan]] || [[word:dhajalakan|dhajalakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:dhajalathaoro|dhajalathaoro]] || [[word:dhajalajaoro|dhajalajaoro]] || [[word:dhajalashaoro|dhajalashaoro]] || [[word:dhajalakaoro|dhajalakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|a27364f}}
